actions.instructions: Please provide a picture of the inspector in front of the factory gate.

zh.instructions: 请提供验货员在工厂大门前的照片。

actions.instructions:
1. Please add/take those pictures inside the generic picture section (Toolbox (top right corner) > Camera): Factory Front Gate / Inspector in front of factory / Warehouse / Finished and Packed products / Finished but not packed / Semi-finished products / Total carton selected / Total pieces selected / All defectives pieces / Factory disclaimer / COC / (Draft Report - Optional)

2. Contact QIMA quality team if the inspection is performed in the warehouse which does not belong to the factory or the supplier. If goods at another location (belongs to the supplier) no more than 5-15 mins by walking - still proceed with the inspection and reflect the location in the report and notify the back office. 

3. All defects must be clearly documented and photographed in the report. If no defects are found, note "No defect found" in the report; do not leave it blank.

4. Please put the picture by SKU by color which means that if there are 2 color of 1 SKU, you will need to put 2 picture in this section.

5.Please use TAG feature in QIMAone to organize photos with captions per SKU. 
Please see this video link tutorial: https://www.loom.com/share/8ba5648b963740f79fffcc754f524edd

zh.instructions:
1. 请将这些图片添加/拍摄到通用图片部分（工具箱（右上角）> 相机）：工厂正门 / 验货员在工厂前 / 仓库 / 完成并包装的产品 / 完成但未包装 / 半成品 / 总抽箱数量 / 总抽样数量 / 所有缺陷件 / 工厂免责声明 / COC / （草稿报告 - 可选）
2. 如果检查是在不属于工厂或供应商的仓库进行，请联系QIMA质量团队。如果货物在另一个地点（属于供应商）步行不超过5-15分钟 - 仍然进行检查，并在报告中反映地点并通知办公室。
3. 所有缺陷必须在报告中清晰记录和拍照。如果没有发现缺陷，请在报告中注明“未发现缺陷”；请勿留空。
4. 请按颜色将图片按SKU放置，这意味着如果1个SKU有2种颜色，您需要在此部分放置2张图片。
5. 请在QIMAone中使用标签功能为每个SKU组织带有标题的照片。
请查看此视频链接教程：https://www.loom.com/share/8ba5648b963740f79fffcc754f524edd

elements.instruction:
Please input the total quantity finished and packed in pcs and %, the total quantity finished and unpacked in pcs and %.
If products are not ready for inspection:
      - Check the available product and semi-finished product and ask the factory to provide the packing material if available. 
      - Marked inspection as FAILED.
      - If there is no product (semi-finished product) available in factory, issue a MISSED REPORT.
elements.expectedResult:
Quantity Ready and Packed should be matching the service type (100% / 80% for PSI - 20 % / 20% for DUPRO - 5% / 5% for IPC - ...)
Pls follow the below template on your comment.
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Packed
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Unpacked

zh.name: 可用数量检查：完成&包装&未包装
zh.expectedResult:
准备和包装的数量应与服务类型匹配（100% / 80%用于PSI - 20% / 20%用于DUPRO - 5% / 5%用于IPC - ...）
请按照以下模板在您的评论中填写。
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&包装
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&未包装
zh.instruction:
请输入完成并包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示），完成并未包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示）。
如果产品未准备好进行检查：
- 检查可用产品和半成品，并要求工厂提供包装材料（如果可用）。
- 将检查标记为不通过。
- 如果工厂没有可用的产品（半成品），请发布放空报告。

elements.name: Available Quantity Check: Finished&Packed&Unpacked

elements.instruction:
Please fill in the quantity details for item/reference/sku available on-site. 
Please add inspected quantity and inspected number of cartons.

zh.name: 可用数量详情
zh.instruction:
请填写现场可用项/参考/SKU的数量详情。
请添加检查数量和检查的纸箱数量。

elements.name: Available Quantity Details

elements.instruction:
Were you able to select the cartons / sampling size fully randomly ? 
If yes, the result is passed, If not, the result is failed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Take a picture of the stacks of cartons before selection​
2. Choose cartons from every pallet/stack.​
3. Choose cartons from different parts of the stack (top, bottom, left, right, front, back, middle, inside), including not accessible cartons ​
4. Ask factory for support in moving the goods if they are not accessible​
5. Take a picture of the stack after the selecting the cartons, showing how the random selection was done. ​
6. Take a picture of all selected cartons​
7. Follow the cartons from the warehouse to the inspection area, make sure they are not tempered with.  ​
8. Add a remark in the report and inform back-office if you cannot proceed with the random carton selection, explaining the reason.

zh.name: 随机抽箱
zh.expectedResult:
1. 在选择之前拍摄纸箱堆的照片​
2. 从每个托盘/堆中选择纸箱。​
3. 从堆的不同部分选择纸箱（顶部、底部、左侧、右侧、前面、后面、中间、内部），包括无法触及的纸箱​
4. 如果货物无法触及，请向工厂寻求支持以移动货物​
5. 在选择纸箱后拍摄堆的照片，显示随机选择是如何进行的。​
6. 拍摄所有选定纸箱的照片​
7. 从仓库跟踪纸箱到检查区域，确保它们没有被掉包。​
8. 如果您无法进行随机抽箱，请在报告中添加备注并通知办公室，说明原因。
zh.instruction:
您是否能够完全随机选择纸箱/抽样数量？
如果是，则结果为通过；如果不是，则结果为不通过。

Upload Close-up Picture of Shipping Mark.

如果发现任何损坏/潮湿/变形的外纸箱（或托盘），请备注数量。
上传纸箱或托盘的正面、顶部、左侧、右侧、后面、角落、概览的照片。

elements.name: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side

elements.instruction: Check 5 cartons for assortment, dimensions, and weights.
elements.expectedResult:
Follow QIMA standard tolerance ±5% if there is no specified.
Double check the data consistent in the report & picture attached [Dimension/ Weight/PO/Lot number etc]
Remark the Carton Ply in the comment.
Correct measurement and photography requirements
- Tape parallel to the edge
- The tape is parallel to the edge and close to the object being measured
- Add below bad example

comment.message: For item:1201735,Found carton size was different from spec.but same as shipping mark.

en.message: For item:1201735, found carton size was different from spec but same as shipping mark.

zh.name: 外包装：混装、尺寸与重量
zh.expectedResult:
如果没有指定，请遵循QIMA标准公差±5%。
仔细检查报告中数据的一致性与附带的图片[尺寸/重量/采购订单/批号等]
在评论中备注纸箱层数。
正确的测量和摄影要求
- 测量带平行于边缘
- 测量带平行于边缘并靠近被测物体
- 添加以下不良示例
zh.instruction: 检查5个纸箱的混装、尺寸和重量。

elements.name: Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight

elements.instruction: Perform a carton drop test on the export cartons. (Follow the client's specification, carried out on 3 cartons according to ISTA 1A procedure if no specified).
elements.expectedResult: Let the carton fall freely on each of its faces, 3 edges and 1 corner from the specified height (if not specified use: <10kg: 76cm; 10-19kg: 61cm; 19-28kg: 46cm; 28-45kg: 31cm; 45-68kg: 20cm).

zh.name: 摔箱测试
zh.expectedResult: 让纸箱自由落下，落在每个面、3个边和1个角，从指定高度（如果未指定，使用：<10kg：76cm；10-19kg：61cm；19-28kg：46cm；28-45kg：31cm；45-68kg：20cm）。
zh.instruction: 对出口纸箱进行摔箱测试。（遵循客户规格，根据ISTA 1A程序在3个纸箱上进行，如果没有指定）。

elements.name: Carton drop test

elements.instruction:
1. Availability of Mold Prevention Unit
2. Availability of Vent Hole
elements.expectedResult:
Upload pictures of Unit Packing, Inner Packing Front, Inner Packing Side, Inner Packing Top, Inner Packing Back.
Remark if any Damaged/Wet/ Deformed inner Carton & Deformed Product, the quantity of them.

zh.name: 内包装与零售包装
zh.expectedResult:
上传单位包装、内包装正面、内包装侧面、内包装顶部、内包装背面的照片。
如果发现任何损坏/潮湿/变形的内纸箱和变形产品，请备注数量。
zh.instruction:
1. 防霉单元的可用性
2. 通风孔的可用性

elements.name: Inner Packing & Unit Packing

elements.instruction: Verify if the information of the product (PO number/item number/product description) packed inside the packing matches the information on the corresponding packing (gift box/export carton) or not if applicable

zh.name: 匹配包装信息
zh.instruction: 验证包装内的产品信息（采购订单号/项目编号/产品描述）是否与相应包装（礼品盒/出口纸箱）上的信息匹配（如适用）。

elements.name: Match packing info

elements.instruction:
Shake test - Only for products with blister package and shake by hand for the product before opening the blister.

To see: 1/If the products are coming out of the package or become misaligned. 
2/to confirm if the products are securely fastened

zh.name: 摇动测试信息
zh.instruction:
摇动测试 - 仅适用于有吸塑包装的产品，打开吸塑前手动摇动产品。
观察：1/产品是否从包装中出来或变得不对齐。
2/ 确认产品是否安全固定。

elements.name: Shake test info

elements.name: End workmanship

elements.instruction:
If the products are packed in pallet or display, please compare it with client's specification.
The pallet / display should be strong enough and in good condition to support the safety of goods during transportation.
elements.expectedResult: Remark any damage/wet found on site

zh.name: 托盘展示条件检查 - 测试
zh.expectedResult: 备注现场发现的任何损坏/潮湿
zh.instruction:
如果产品包装在托盘或展示中，请与客户的规格进行比较。
托盘/展示应足够坚固，处于良好状态，以支持货物在运输过程中的安全。

elements.name: Pallet Display Condition Check - Test

elements.instruction: Please put the picture by SKU by color which means that if there are 2 color of 1 SKU, you will need to put 2 picture in this section with SKU name in the caption accordingly.
elements.expectedResult:
Please check carefully the provided file like artwork etc. before the inspection. If there's any conversation record offered by the supplier, please put a screenshot and date record on the report.

For all items made from metal: 
1. Moisture will be checked for metal material products to measure the level and potential for rust or mildew to develop. 
2. Check product screws also (if the product is assembled), to verify that there are no rusted screws. 
3. If the products are not assembled, will check parts as well (ex. Pipes, components) to verify that there are no rusted parts).

zh.name: 产品样式与结构
zh.expectedResult:
请在检查之前仔细检查提供的文件，如艺术作品等。如果供应商提供了任何对话记录，请在报告中放置截图和日期记录。
对于所有金属制成的物品：
1. 将检查金属材料产品的湿度，以测量生锈或霉变的潜力。
2. 还要检查产品螺丝（如果产品已组装），以验证没有锈蚀的螺丝。
3. 如果产品未组装，也将检查部件（例如管道、组件），以验证没有锈蚀的部件。
zh.instruction: 请按SKU按颜色放置图片，这意味着如果一个SKU有2种颜色，您需要在此部分放置2张带有SKU名称的图片。

elements.name: Product Style & Construction

elements.instruction: Check that the colors are conform to the specifications from the client, and record the corresponding pantone code and / or deviation from the expected result.
elements.expectedResult:
If there is product pantone code on client’s specification, please do the product pantone code check.
Product shall be in the correct shade / color inside of the allowable 4-5 color shading range if no specification provided.

zh.name: 产品颜色规格检查
zh.expectedResult:
如果客户的规格上有产品潘通色号，请进行产品潘通色号检查。
如果没有提供规格，产品应在允许的4-5种颜色阴影范围内的正确色调/颜色。
zh.instruction: 检查颜色是否符合客户的规格，并记录相应的潘通色号和/或与预期结果的偏差。

elements.name: Product Color Specification Check

elements.instruction:
Check the logo according to the product specification:
1. Quality and design
2. Spelling
3. Font
4. Color
5. Dimension, positioning and alignment
elements.expectedResult: The logo should be of good quality, correct, complete, legible and not damaged compared to the specifications or the approval sample.

zh.name: 产品商标
zh.expectedResult: 与规格或批准样品相比，商标应质量良好、正确、完整、清晰且无损坏。
zh.instruction:
根据产品规格检查商标：
1. 质量和设计
2. 拼写
3. 字体
4. 颜色
5. 尺寸、位置和对齐

elements.name: Product Logo

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the specified labels are found attached to the product.
2. Check that the information of the label is correct to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
Upload picture for all
- Markings / label / Hangtag on the product
- Label/marking on others accessories and components

1. All specified labels shall be present and attached correctly to the product.
2. The information on the labels shall be correct to specifications.
3. It should not have been modified by hand or with extra sticker.

zh.name: 产品标签
zh.expectedResult:
上传所有的照片
- 产品上的标记/标签/吊牌
- 其他配件和组件上的标签/标记
1. 所有指定标签应存在并正确附加到产品上。
2. 标签上的信息应符合规格。
3. 不应手动修改或附加额外的贴纸。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查指定标签是否附加到产品上。
2. 检查标签上的信息是否符合规格。

elements.name: Product Labels

elements.expectedResult:
Add scanning barcode result for each SKU in report.

Please take the product picture per SKU and attach it to the "Inspected product" in the "Detail tab" of the inspector APP. If there is a different color of one SKU, you need to take the picture for each color separately. Need to show in report pictures of all SKU checked

zh.name: 产品详情 - 条形码
zh.expectedResult:
为每个SKU在报告中添加扫描条形码的结果。
请为每个SKU拍摄产品照片，并将其附加到验货员APP的“详情选项卡”中的“检查产品”中。如果一个SKU有不同颜色，您需要分别为每种颜色拍照。需要在报告中显示所有检查的SKU的照片。

elements.name: Product Details - Barcode

elements.instruction: Check the dimensions, shape, style or color of the product against the approval sample if it's on-site and take for pictures.
elements.expectedResult: The products should be matched with the approval sample, a detailed caption is needed on approval sample and the bulk products.

zh.name: 批准样品比较
zh.expectedResult: 产品应与批准样品匹配，批准样品和大货产品需要详细说明。
zh.instruction: 检查产品的尺寸、形状、样式或颜色是否与现场的批准样品相符，并拍照。

elements.name: Approval Sample Comparison

elements.instruction: For products with manual/instructions sheet (home appliance, bath, lighting, furniture etc), please check if the IM matches with client's artwork.
elements.expectedResult: If not applicable, remark N/A

zh.name: 带手册或说明的产品 - 测试
zh.expectedResult: 如果不适用，请备注N/A
zh.instruction: 对于带手册/说明书的产品（家用电器、浴室、照明、家具等），请检查IM是否与客户的艺术作品匹配。

elements.name: Products With Manual Or Instruction - Test

zh.name: 带手册或说明的产品检查

elements.name: Products with Manual or Instruction Check

elements.instruction:
Compare actual dimensions vs customer's specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.
Check the general dimension and product weight if there are not specification client dimensions. 5pcs per item.
elements.expectedResult:
Pls upload the screenshot of the dimension chart.
Upload all pictures of measurements, measurement charts (excel) and screenshot of the measurement charts.
For the screenshot, use the spotlight feature to enlarge the screenshot in the final report.

zh.name: 产品尺寸结果
zh.expectedResult:
请上传尺寸表的截图。
上传所有测量照片、测量表（excel）和测量表的截图。
对于截图，在最终报告中使用突出显示照片功能放大截图。
zh.instruction:
比较实际尺寸与客户的规格和技术图纸。如果客户没有提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。
检查一般尺寸和产品重量，如果没有客户规格的尺寸。每个项目5个。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Result

elements.instruction:
Compare actual weight vs customer specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are
provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.
elements.expectedResult: Pls upload the screenshot of the weight table.

zh.name: 产品重量结果
zh.expectedResult: 请上传重量表的截图。
zh.instruction: 比较实际重量与客户规格和技术图纸。如果客户没有提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。

elements.name: Product Weights Result

zh.name: 检查的总件数与纸箱数

elements.instruction: For E&E products (home appliance, bath, lighting etc), please take clear picture of plugs with legible markings for each reference checked.
elements.expectedResult: If not applicable, remark N/A

zh.name: 仅E和E产品检查
zh.expectedResult: 如果不适用，请备注N/A
zh.instruction: 对于E&E产品（家用电器、浴室、照明等），请为每个检查的参考拍摄带有清晰标记的插头的照片。

elements.name: E And E Products Check Only

elements.expectedResult: Remark Special Request From Sale and the expected result

zh.name: 销售的特殊请求
zh.expectedResult: 备注销售的特殊请求及预期结果

elements.name: Special Request From Sale
Special Request From Sale In Charge

actions.instructions:
For TESTS, mandatory to have comments, photos, and result.
For DEFECTS, mandatory to always record by SKU.

zh.instructions:
对于测试，必须有评论、照片和结果。
对于缺陷，必须始终按SKU记录。

elements.instruction:
1. Check that there is no obvious damage from needles from construction. 
2. Pull the seams by hand using force for 10s to inspect the needle holes for defects
elements.expectedResult: There shall be no needle damage.

zh.name: 针损检查
zh.expectedResult: 不应有针损。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查构造中是否有明显的针损。
2. 手动用力拉扯缝合线 10 秒，检查针孔是否有缺陷。

elements.name: Needle damage check

elements.instruction: Check the certificate of treatment / fumigation of the raw wood material against woodborers.
elements.expectedResult: The factory should provide the raw material treatment / fumigation certificate

zh.name: 木蠹虫处理检查
zh.expectedResult: 工厂应提供原材料处理/熏蒸证明。
zh.instruction: 检查原木材料的处理/熏蒸证明以防止木蠹虫。

elements.name: Woodborer treatment check

elements.instruction:
1.For dimension of accessory 3mm-6mm,use clamp or hook to fix the accessory, slowly apply 50 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. then second apply the force with the direction of perpendicular to the 1st direction. slowly apply 50 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 5 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
2. For dimension of accessory more than 6mm,use clamp or hook to fix the accessory, slowly apply 70 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. then second apply the force with the direction of perpendicular to the 1st direction. slowly apply 70 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 7 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
3. For garment seams or footwear bonding strength of upper and sole. use clamp to fix the test part. slowly apply 100 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 10 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
elements.expectedResult: No deformation, detachment, breakage in testing or after test for accessory or garment seams and footwear bonding strength of upper and sole.

zh.name: 拉力测试
zh.expectedResult: 在测试或测试后，配件或服装缝合强度以及鞋面与鞋底的粘合强度不应有变形、脱落或断裂。
zh.instruction:
1. 对于配件尺寸为 3mm-6mm，使用夹具或钩子固定配件，缓慢施加 50 N 并保持该力 10 秒。然后第二次施加与第一次方向垂直的力，缓慢施加 50 N 并保持该力 10 秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用 5 kg 砝码替代拉力计。
2. 对于配件尺寸超过 6mm，使用夹具或钩子固定配件，缓慢施加 70 N 并保持该力 10 秒。然后第二次施加与第一次方向垂直的力，缓慢施加 70 N 并保持该力 10 秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用 7 kg 砝码替代拉力计。
3. 对于服装缝合或鞋面与鞋底的粘合强度，使用夹具固定测试部分，缓慢施加 100 N 并保持该力 10 秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用 10 kg 砝码替代拉力计。

elements.name: Pull test

elements.instruction: Repeatedly use the product and its adjustable parts to the full extent of their capacity for 20 cycles with the force by hand, or following the client specifications if there is any.
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use; it should still function normally, without any loss.

zh.name: 疲劳测试
zh.expectedResult: 产品或部件在使用后不应断裂、变形或以任何方式受损；应仍能正常工作，无任何损失。
zh.instruction: 重复使用产品及其可调部件至其容量的极限，进行 20 次循环，手动施加力，或根据客户规格进行。

elements.name: Fatigue test

elements.instruction:
1. Pour water over the waterproof surface of the product, covering all areas;
2. Verify the other side to check if the water can go through.
elements.expectedResult: The water should not go through.

zh.name: 防水测试（不透水性）
zh.expectedResult: 水不应渗透。
zh.instruction:
1. 将水倒在产品的防水表面，覆盖所有区域；
2. 验证另一侧以检查水是否渗透。

elements.name: Waterproof test (impermeability)

elements.instruction:
1. Smell the product, checking for any odor;
2. Compare to that of the approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: No offensive or unexpected odor.

zh.name: 气味检查 / 嗅觉测试
zh.expectedResult: 不应有异味或刺鼻的气味。
zh.instruction:
1. 嗅闻产品，检查是否有任何气味；
2. 与批准样品进行比较。

elements.name: Odor check / Smell test

elements.instruction:
Use a proper rubbing cloth (do not use a random fabric). If needed ask factory to provide rubbing cloth from their testing lab. 
1. Rub the product or label with a dry white cotton cloth ten times over a 10cm distance. 
2. Rub the product or a label with a white cotton cloth soaked with water ten times over a 10cm distance. 
3. Rub the product or a label with white cotton cloth soaked with petroleum spirit ten times over a 10cm distance.  
(follow client specification). 
4. Ensure to perform the test on each external color and fabric.
elements.expectedResult:
1. There shall be no color transfer greater than 4 on a grey scale (between the original white cloth and the colored one) after the dry test. 
2. There shall be no color transfer greater than 3-4 on a grey scale (between the original white cloth and the colored one) after the wet test. 
3. The product or label's print shall stay fixed onto its surface and not dull or peel away. (be damaged)

zh.name: 摩擦（纺织品）测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 干燥测试后，灰度色差不应大于 4（在原白布和有色布之间）。
2. 湿润测试后，灰度色差不应大于 3-4（在原白布和有色布之间）。
3. 产品或标签的印刷应牢固附着在其表面上，不应变得暗淡或脱落。（受损）
zh.instruction:
使用适当的摩擦布（不要使用随机面料）。如有需要，请工厂提供测试实验室的摩擦布。
1. 用干燥的白色棉布在 10cm 的距离上摩擦产品或标签十次。
2. 用浸水的白色棉布在 10cm 的距离上摩擦产品或标签十次。
3. 用浸有石油醚的白色棉布在 10cm 的距离上摩擦产品或标签十次。
（遵循客户规格）。
4. 确保对每种外部颜色和面料进行测试。

elements.name: Rubbing (textile) test

elements.instruction: Pull the product by hand at the seam location (side seam, waist band seam, inseam, belt loops etc) for 10 seconds to test the strength of the seam and check for fabric.
elements.expectedResult: All seams should be secured, no slippage and not fabric tearing.

zh.name: 缝合强度测试
zh.expectedResult: 所有缝合应牢固，无滑移和无面料撕裂。
zh.instruction: 手动在缝合位置（侧缝、腰带缝、内缝、皮带环等）拉扯产品 10 秒以测试缝合强度并检查面料。

elements.name: Seam strength test

elements.instruction: Test the durability of the item by folding, rolling and flapping it.
elements.expectedResult: There should be no damage to the product after the test.

zh.name: 耐久性测试（折叠、滚动……）
zh.expectedResult: 测试后产品不应有损坏。
zh.instruction: 通过折叠、滚动和拍打来测试物品的耐久性。

elements.name: Durability test (folding, rolling...)

elements.expectedResult:
The artwork, logo, marking or the area tested are completed and clear after the test.
There should not be any peeled off after the tape is removed, nor any color transferred onto the tape.

zh.name: 粘合测试
zh.expectedResult:
测试后的艺术作品、标志、标记或测试区域应完整且清晰。
移除胶带后不应有脱落，也不应有颜色转移到胶带上。
zh.instruction:
1. 在测试前确保表面干净。
2. 使用一条压力敏感胶带（例如 3M 500）并将其牢固地应用于整个待测试区域：艺术作品、标志、标记或客户指定的区域；
3. 用 9N 的力在表面上按压胶带，以确保胶带牢固粘贴，没有气泡或皱纹；
4. 以接近 60 度的角度迅速但不剧烈地移除胶带，时间为 0.5-1 秒。
5. 在同一区域重复此操作 3 次，使用过的胶带应被剪掉。

elements.name: Adhesive test

elements.instruction:
1. Test the function of the product to the full extent of its capacities.
2. If available apply the instructions given in the client specifications or product documentations.
3. If the product includes components or accessories, each one must be tested and must come from the bulk production.
elements.expectedResult:
Product should function as intended and meet all client requirements.
Report any discrepancy.

zh.name: 功能测试
zh.expectedResult:
产品应按预期功能正常，并满足所有客户要求。
报告任何不符之处。
zh.instruction:
1. 测试产品的功能，充分发挥其能力。
2. 如有可能，应用客户规格或产品文档中的说明。
3. 如果产品包含组件或配件，每个组件都必须经过测试，并且必须来自大货生产。

elements.name: Function test

elements.expectedResult: The deviation should be within the acceptable range as per the specifications, if there is no specification available, Use grey scale 4 as the acceptable limit.

zh.name: 色差检查
zh.expectedResult: 偏差应在规格规定的可接受范围内，如果没有可用的规格，则使用灰度 4 作为可接受的限制。
zh.instruction:
1. 在光箱下评估产品的颜色和色调（每种颜色 2 件，D65 光源，除非客户另有规定）
2. 将检查过的样品并排放置；
3. 确定一个样品与另一个样品之间的颜色偏差；
4. 检查与批准样品或生产批准样品的色差。

elements.name: Color shading check

elements.instruction: Count the number of stitches per inch compared to specifications or approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: The number of stitches per inch are correct to specifications or approval sample.

zh.name: 针距密度检查
zh.expectedResult: 每英寸的针数应符合规格或批准样品。
zh.instruction: 与规格或批准样品相比，计算每英寸的针数。

elements.name: Stitch density check

elements.instruction: The folding mechanism is open to its full position and closed again while loaded as intended by the manufacturer 20 times to ensure its endurance.
elements.expectedResult: The product shall not break, deform, stick, fold incorrectly or incompletely.

zh.name: 折叠耐久性测试
zh.expectedResult: 产品不应断裂、变形、粘连、错误折叠或不完全折叠。
zh.instruction: 折叠机制在负载下完全展开并再次关闭，按制造商的意图进行 20 次，以确保其耐久性。

elements.name: Folding endurance test

elements.instruction:
1. Assemble the items according to the instruction manual or specifications.
2. Check all accessories.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The product can be assembled or disassembled.

2.The product or parts shall fit without having to be forced together.

3. No gap or within tolerances, good alignment between parts.

zh.name: 装配测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 产品可以组装或拆卸。
2. 产品或部件应无须强行组合而相互契合。
3. 无缝隙或在公差范围内，部件之间对齐良好。
zh.instruction:
1. 根据说明手册或规格组装物品。
2. 检查所有配件。

elements.name: Assembly test

zh.name: 未修剪的线头 - >1 cm
zh.description: 超过 1 cm

zh.name: 未修剪的线头 - <1 cm
zh.description: 小于 1 cm

defects.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - bigger than 1cm
defects.description: The product contains serious dirt mark/impurty etc visible more than 30cm away. The dirt mark/impurity is bigger than 1cm. There are more than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污渍、污垢 - 大于 1cm
zh.description: 产品含有严重的污垢痕迹/杂质等，从 30cm 以外可见。污垢痕迹/杂质大于 1cm。每平方厘米有超过 3 个污垢痕迹/杂质。

defects.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - less than 1cm
defects.description: The product contains dirt mark/impurty etc only visible less than 30cm away. The dirt mark/impurity is less than 1cm. There are less than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污渍、污垢 - 小于 1cm
zh.description: 产品仅含有从 30cm 以外可见的污垢痕迹/杂质等。污垢痕迹/杂质小于 1cm。每平方厘米有少于 3 个污垢痕迹/杂质。

defects.name: Wavy or Uneven stitching - more than 2 cm

zh.name: 波浪形或不均匀缝合 - 大于 2 cm
zh.description: 超过 2 cm

defects.name: Wavy or Uneven stitching - less than 2 cm

zh.name: 波浪形或不均匀缝合 - 小于 2 cm
zh.description: 小于 2 cm

defects.name: Damaged / broken product or part
defects.description: The product or any of its parts is broken or damaged, unusable.

zh.name: 损坏/破损的产品或部件
zh.description: 产品或其任何部件破损或损坏，无法使用。

defects.name: Raw edge
defects.description: Raw edge but not sharp and not presenting a danger to end consumer

zh.name: 原边
zh.description: 原边但不锋利，并且不对最终消费者构成危险。

defects.name: Poor finish - visible more than 30cm away
defects.description: The product has a poor finishing defect visible from 30cm away

zh.name: 完成度差 - 从 30cm 以外可见
zh.description: 产品的完成度差，距离 30cm 以外可见。

defects.name: Poor finish - visible at less than 30cm away
defects.description: The product has a poor finishing defect only visible less than 30cm away.

zh.name: 完成度差 - 从 30cm 以内可见
zh.description: 产品的完成度差，仅在距离 30cm 以内可见。

defects.name: Foreign yarn or fibre
defects.description: Presence of unintended yarns or fibers in the fabric

zh.name: 外来纱线或纤维
zh.description: 面料中存在意外的纱线或纤维。

defects.name: Scratch / scarring /Gouge mark - Scratch/scarring
defects.description: Scratch/scarring on primary visible surface > 10 mm length or any deep mark that can be felt by fingernail / breaks coating.

zh.name: 划痕/伤疤/凹痕 - 划痕/伤疤
zh.description: 主表面上划痕/伤疤长度大于 10 mm 或任何可用指甲触摸到的深刻痕迹/破坏涂层。

defects.name: Scratch / scarring /Gouge mark - Light
defects.description: Light scratch/scarring not felt and only visible close-up and only visible less than 30cm away.

zh.name: 划痕/伤疤/凹痕 - 轻微
zh.description: 轻微划痕/伤疤不明显，仅在近距离可见，且仅在 30cm 以内可见。

defects.name: Insect infestation
defects.description: The product contains insects either alive or dead, or insect made products (eggs, webs, etc.).

zh.name: 昆虫侵扰
zh.description: 产品含有活的或死的昆虫，或昆虫制造的产品（卵、网等）。

defects.name: Logo or Brand: Incorrect
defects.description: The brand / logo is incorrect. The brand / logo does not match the required color / spelling and grammar set in the required standards.

zh.name: 标志或品牌：不正确
zh.description: 品牌/标志不正确。品牌/标志不符合所需的颜色/拼写和语法标准。

defects.name: Sharp point / edge
defects.description: The product contains any non-functional, non-specified sharp extremity that can potentially cause harm. This include any protruding nail, screw or staple.

zh.name: 锋利的点/边缘
zh.description: 产品含有任何非功能性、未指定的锋利极端，可能造成伤害。这包括任何突出的钉子、螺丝或订书钉。

defects.name: Part / Component / Product: Wrong, Missing, Inccorrect - Cri
defects.description: The product is missing or have the wrong products / parts / Components.

zh.name: 部件/组件/产品：错误、缺失、不正确 - 致命
zh.description: 产品缺失或有错误的产品/部件/组件。

defects.name: Part / Component / Product: Wrong, Missing, Inccorrect - Maj
defects.description: The product is missing or have the wrong products / parts / Components.

zh.name: 部件/组件/产品：错误、缺失、不正确 - 重要
zh.description: 产品缺失或有错误的产品/部件/组件。

elements.instruction:
Please confirm the factory location is the same as booked by the client. 
Note: if goods at another supplier's location (within a 5-15 minute walk) are still subject to inspection, proceed as usual. Include the location in the report and notify the back office.

zh.name: 工厂/车间位置是否与预订相同？
zh.instruction:
请确认工厂位置与客户预订的相同。
注意：如果货物在其他供应商的位置（步行 5-15 分钟内）仍需检查，请照常进行。将位置包括在报告中并通知办公室。

elements.name: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked?

zh.name: 工厂合作、组织和清洁度

elements.instruction: Please confirm the lighting & cleanliness conditions in the inspection room. Make a remark if you find it dirty.
elements.expectedResult: Record and upload a picture of inspection room.

zh.expectedResult: 记录并上传检查室的照片。
zh.instruction: 请确认检查室的照明和清洁条件。如发现脏乱，请做备注。
zh.name: 检查室的照明和清洁条件

elements.name: Inspection Room Lighting & Cleanliness Conditions

elements.instruction: (In case the inspection takes place outside of the factory (warehouse for example) the inspector must ask to see the production line to take pictures and in case the supplier refuse, must explain what happened in the report)
elements.expectedResult:
Take photos of the Production Lines every time even if the product is done 100%.

Production line 1
Production line 2
...

zh.name: 工厂的生产线
zh.expectedResult:
每次拍摄生产线的照片，即使产品已完成 100%。
生产线 1
生产线 2
...
zh.instruction: （如果检查在工厂外进行（例如仓库），检查员必须要求查看生产线以拍照，如果供应商拒绝，必须在报告中解释发生了什么）

elements.name: Production line of factory

elements.instruction: Were the tools provided by the factory calibrated?

zh.name: 工具校准
zh.instruction: 工厂提供的工具是否经过校准？

elements.name: Tools calibration

elements.instruction: Note: If the vendor information (address already in IP) is not the same that the factory information (address where inspection took place) the inspector should make a clear "important remark" about it.

zh.name: 工厂电子邮件
zh.instruction: 注意：如果供应商信息（已在 IP 中的地址）与工厂信息（检查发生的地址）不相同，检查员应对此做出明确的“重要备注”。

elements.name: Factory Email

elements.instruction: Inspector input manually in English

zh.name: 工厂员工人数
zh.instruction: 检查员手动输入英文

elements.name: Factory number of employees

elements.instruction: Inspector input manually in English

zh.name: 他们声称与供应商的关系是什么？
zh.instruction: 检查员手动输入英文

elements.name: Which Relationship they claim to have with vendor?

elements.instruction: Please record the actual factory name

elements.name: Factory Name in Chinese

elements.instruction: Factory Disclaimer and COC must be signed by inspectors and factory representatives. Pictures of the signed documents must be provided.

zh.name: QIMA 文档是否已签署？
zh.instruction: 工厂免责声明和 COC 必须由检查员和工厂代表签署。必须提供签署文件的照片。

elements.name: Are the QIMA documents signed?

elements.instruction: Draft Report must be signed by inspectors and factory representatives. Pictures of the signed documents must be provided.

zh.name: 草稿报告是否已签署？
zh.instruction: 草稿报告必须由检查员和工厂代表签署。必须提供签署文件的照片。

zh.name: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和 COC

elements.name: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report and COC

actions.text:
Issued by QIMA Inspection (Shenzhen) Limited
Reviewed by Joseph Wang

THE ABOVE RESULT(S) REFLECT(S) QIMA LIMITED’S FINDINGS AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF INSPECTION. THIS REPORT DOES NOT RELEASE THE BUYER OR SELLER FROM CONTRACTUAL RESPONSIBILITIES, NOR DOES IT PREJUDICE THE BUYER’S RIGHT OF CLAIM TOWARD THE SELLER/SUPPLIER FOR COMPENSATION FOR ANY APPARENT AND/OR HIDDEN DEFECTS NOT DETECTED DURING INSPECTION OR OCCURRING ANYTIME THEREAFTER.

globalRemark.message:

2. No approval sample for reference during the inspection.
3. No tolerance is provided for product weight. Please see the measurement details.
4. No calibration of the certificate on the scale. Data just for your reference.

en.message:
1. For item:1201735, found carton size was different from spec but same as shipping mark.
2. No approval sample for reference during the inspection.
3. No tolerance is provided for product weight. Please see the measurement details.
4. No calibration of the certificate on the scale. Data just for your reference.

defectsFound.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - less than 1cm
defectsFound.description: The product contains dirt mark/impurty etc only visible less than 30cm away. The dirt mark/impurity is less than 1cm. There are less than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污渍、污垢 - 小于 1cm
zh.description: 产品仅含有从 30cm 以外可见的污垢痕迹/杂质等。污垢痕迹/杂质小于 1cm。每平方厘米有少于 3 个污垢痕迹/杂质。

defectsFound.name: Damaged / broken product or part
defectsFound.description: The product or any of its parts is broken or damaged, unusable.

zh.name: 损坏/破损的产品或部件
zh.description: 产品或其任何部件破损或损坏，无法使用。

customField.label: QSP Product Name
customField.placeholder: Please copy and paste the QIMA product name from SSO in this field only when it’s needed.
